details.IncidentDetail: "[8] 6-P7 WB JWO LOVEKIN LANES ARE CLOSED "
"[6] 6-P7 RUNNING A BREAK EB JWO LOVEKIN "
"[2] NO VEH SEEN IN THE AREA "
"[17] 71-055 1185 - SIL TOYT TUN ON ITS WHEELS IN THE CREEK - MAJ FRONT END DMG "
"[9] LATE ENTRY RP FELL ASLEEP , WENT OFF THE RDWY "
"[3] PROBABLY CAN'T SEE THE VEH FROM THE RDWY "
"[6] CLOSURE PICKED UP / 172 ON RAMP TO EB 58 OPEN"

"[51] JandM BWY ADV ENRT 15 MIN ETA "

"[45] [Notification] [CHP]-^CT 632 - 1097/98, ADV TRLR IS DARK, REALLY CLOSE TO FOGLINE, AND THE CONES USED ARE TOO SMALL (MAYBE 6-8" TALL) THIS IS A POSS HAZARD TO BIG RIGS DRIVING THRU THE AREA REQ TRLR BE REMOVED ASAP [Shared]"
"[38] 1185 LL ADVS WILL RETURN APPROX 0730 / 0800 W/ EQUIPMENT NEEDED - PLACED ONG CONES AROUND TRLR"
"[37] 85-4 BOTH LANES ARE OPEN NOT AFFECTING RDWAY"
"[36] C85-004 1185 CREW IS UNLOADING TRLR WILL RECALL WHEN NEEDING 1184 "
"[35] COPY LINE 34 / GRAVES WILL ADV ONCE FIRE CLRS"
"[34] ^1039 CT632--- REF LINE 29 and 31/// CT632 ADVS IT IS CONCRETE/// IF CHP NEEDS ANY CLEAN UP TO TASK US"
"[29] ^CT INQ IF CT SUP IS REQ TO CHECK FOR FIRE DMG [Shared]"

"[25] B85-044 TRAFFIC FLOWING SLOWLY THROUGH #1 LANE FLARES ARE PUT OUT 1022 85-21 [Shared]"
"[17] B85-011 AFFIRM FIRE DEPT IS 97 BLOCKING BOTH LANES TRLR ENGULFED [Shared]"
"[13] BRAWLEY FD LL REQ ETA / FIRE NOT 97 YET [Shared]"
"[4] DRIVER O/O VEH - XFR BRAWLEY FD"
